languages.text: {n}Себериан повелительно вскидывает руку.{/n} "Соратники, время пришло. Слушайте мой приказ: привести в исполнение план сенешаля Войгтвир! Приготовиться к обороне! За династию фон Валанциус! За Императора!"

traits.locale_text: [draft]Последние сомнения покидают Себериана, он готов действовать по совету Ларии, приказывает ей приготовиться к бою!

languages.text: {n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан повелительно вскидывает руку.{/n} "Соратники, время пришло. Слушайте мой приказ: привести в исполнение план сенешаля Войгтвир! Приготовиться к обороне! За династию фон Валанциус! За Императора!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

{n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

{n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安以威严的姿态举起手臂。{/n}“盟友们，时机已到。听我号令——执行维特威尔总领的计划！准备保卫宫殿！为了冯·瓦兰修斯王朝！为了帝皇！”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安以威严的姿态举起手臂。{/n}“盟友们，时机已到。听我号令——执行维特威尔总领的计划！准备保卫宫殿！为了冯·瓦兰修斯王朝！为了帝皇！”

languages.text: {n}Seberian lève un bras dans un geste impérieux.{/n} « Alliés, le moment est venu. Voilà mon ordre : exécutez le plan de la sénéchale Voigtvir ! Préparez-vous à défendre le palais ! Pour la dynastie von Valancius ! Pour l'Empereur ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian lève un bras dans un geste impérieux.{/n} « Alliés, le moment est venu. Voilà mon ordre : exécutez le plan de la sénéchale Voigtvir ! Préparez-vous à défendre le palais ! Pour la dynastie von Valancius ! Pour l'Empereur ! »

languages.text: {n}Seberian levanta el brazo con gesto imperioso.{/n} «Aliados, ha llegado el momento. Escuchen mis palabras: ¡ejecuten el plan de la Senescal Voigtvir! ¡Prepárense para defender el palacio! ¡Por la dinastía von Valancius! ¡Por el Emperador!».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian levanta el brazo con gesto imperioso.{/n} «Aliados, ha llegado el momento. Escuchen mis palabras: ¡ejecuten el plan de la Senescal Voigtvir! ¡Prepárense para defender el palacio! ¡Por la dinastía von Valancius! ¡Por el Emperador!».

languages.text: {n}Seberian, otoriter bir hareketle konulu kaldırıyor.{/n} "Müttefiklerim, vakit geldi. Emrime kulak verin: Seneşal Voigtvir'in planını uygulayın! Sarayı savunmaya hazırlanın! Von Valancius hanedanlığı için! İmparator için!"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, otoriter bir hareketle konulu kaldırıyor.{/n} "Müttefiklerim, vakit geldi. Emrime kulak verin: Seneşal Voigtvir'in planını uygulayın! Sarayı savunmaya hazırlanın! Von Valancius hanedanlığı için! İmparator için!"

languages.text: {n}Seberian hebt seinen Arm zu einer herrschaftlichen Geste.{/n} "Verbündete, die Zeit ist gekommen. Das ist mein Befehl: Führt den Plan von Truchsessin Voigtvir aus! Bereitet die Verteidigung des Palastes vor! Für die Dynastie von Valancius! Für den Imperator!"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hebt seinen Arm zu einer herrschaftlichen Geste.{/n} "Verbündete, die Zeit ist gekommen. Das ist mein Befehl: Führt den Plan von Truchsessin Voigtvir aus! Bereitet die Verteidigung des Palastes vor! Für die Dynastie von Valancius! Für den Imperator!"

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは威厳に満ちたジェスチャーで腕を挙げた。{/n}「同盟国、時が来た。私の命令に従え。ヴォイトヴィル卿の計画を実行せよ！宮殿の防衛に備えよ！フォン・ヴァランシウス家のため！皇帝のため！」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raised his arm in an imperious gesture.{/n} "Allies, the time has come. Heed my order: carry out Seneschal Voigtvir's plan! Prepare to defend the palace! For the von Valancius dynasty! For the Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは威厳に満ちたジェスチャーで腕を挙げた。{/n}「同盟国、時が来た。私の命令に従え。ヴォイトヴィル卿の計画を実行せよ！宮殿の防衛に備えよ！フォン・ヴァランシウス家のため！皇帝のため！」
